name: Claim denied by firm after AI referral—can I appeal in LA?
description: Sue anew; 1-year limit from discovery in CA.

mainEntity.name: Claim denied by firm after AI referral—can I appeal in LA?

acceptedAnswer.text: Sue anew; 1-year limit from discovery in CA.
acceptedAnswer.description: No formal appeal; file suit instead within 1 year. California malpractice discovery rule. Key factors: (1) Denial reasons; (2) AI role evidence; (3) New counsel review. Exhaust internal first.
